name: personalclaw-tools
description: Built-in cross-cutting agent tools — skill invocation, notifications, webhook listeners, the wait primitive, and loop control. (Web search/fetch live in Web Tools; subagents, memory, artifacts, and workflows each have their own provider.)
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Sandbox Mode
x-meta.help: Controls tool execution sandboxing. Auto enables sandboxing based on tool risk level.

x-meta.label: Require Approval
x-meta.help: Whether destructive tool calls require user approval before execution.
